label: Price Chart
description: Candlestick and line chart with technical indicators, volume, and timeframe controls for the selected instrument.

0.4.note: replaced as-never casts with typed assertions (candleData as Array<{time,open,high,low,close,volume?}> and indicatorOverlays as unknown as IndicatorOverlay[]).

0.6.note: — isLoading/error now available from TerminalData context; widget renders loading spinner when isLoading=true.

0.7.note: added candleData.length === 0 guard with instrument-specific empty message.

0.8.note: — isLoading/error now available from TerminalData context; widget renders error message when error is non-null.

l0.notes: 0.1–0.3 PASS. 0.4 FIXED: replaced as-never casts with typed assertions (candleData as Array<{time,open,high,low,close,volume?}> and indicatorOverlays as unknown as IndicatorOverlay[]). 0.5 PASS. 0.6 PASS — isLoading/error now available from TerminalData context; widget renders loading spinner when isLoading=true. 0.7 FIXED: added candleData.length === 0 guard with instrument-specific empty message. 0.8 PASS — isLoading/error now available from TerminalData context; widget renders error message when error is non-null. 0.9 PASS.

1.2.note: use-terminal-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3–1.5 N/A: price chart shows market data for selectedInstrument, not filtered by org/client/strategy directly — instrument selection is driven by scope.strategyIds but the chart data itself is per-instrument.

1.3.note: 1.5 N/A: price chart shows market data for selectedInstrument, not filtered by org/client/strategy directly — instrument selection is driven by scope.strategyIds but the chart data itself is per-instrument.

1.5.note: price chart shows market data for selectedInstrument, not filtered by org/client/strategy directly — instrument selection is driven by scope.strategyIds but the chart data itself is per-instrument.

1.6.note: empty scope shows default instrument chart.

1.7.note: no reference data in lib/mocks — TIMEFRAMES and INDICATORS are widget-local constants (appropriate).

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS: all data from useTerminalData(). 1.2 PASS: use-terminal-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3–1.5 N/A: price chart shows market data for selectedInstrument, not filtered by org/client/strategy directly — instrument selection is driven by scope.strategyIds but the chart data itself is per-instrument. 1.6 PASS: empty scope shows default instrument chart. 1.7 PASS: no reference data in lib/mocks — TIMEFRAMES and INDICATORS are widget-local constants (appropriate).

knownIssues: TerminalData context types candleData and indicatorOverlays as Array<Record<string,unknown>> — context should type them to their real shapes to avoid double-cast in widget
findings: FIXED: Replaced as-never casts on candleData and indicatorOverlays with properly typed assertions (L0.4)
FIXED: Added candleData.length === 0 empty state guard with symbol-specific message (L0.7)
FIXED: TerminalData context extended with isLoading and error fields — widget now shows loading spinner and error message guards (L0.6, L0.8)
